title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Docplexus Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Docplexus Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Docplexus Digital Technologies family as a Backend Developer in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Docplexus Digital Technologies:
Docplexus Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus Digital Technologies!
